content: [Photobooth Egg Spin] You can now download a 360° spinning GIF of your egg!
[Better UI] MORE SETTINGS!!! Added more separate settings that were previously all under General UI Tweaks
[Better UI: Profile] Added the "Mask League Staff" badge for Mask League staff members
[Better UI: Better Inventory] Fixed CC theme bug on Chick'n Winner popup
[Better UI: Better Game Code Input] Fixed bug with empty game codes being accepted
[Better UI: Better Profile] You can now click on your profile picture to change it!
[Better Chat] Chat Events now dissapear after 30 seconds via the new Temporary Chat Events setting!
[MegaMod] Minor optimizations made all around to hopefully help with performance
[MegaMod] Mods with lots of settings now have pages!
